Li Pan жқҺж”Җ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Pan (жқҺж”Җ). Died fighting bandits. Li Pan was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Li Pan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
